title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Your Consulting SRL (3,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 3,000 on Your Consulting SRL. The controller suffered a data leak due to insufficient technical and organisational measures. In particular, the controller failed to regularly test, evaluate and reassess security mea...
